# Cozy Cinema

> A cozy space for friends to share movie nights, book digital tickets, keep a shared movie journal, and watch together in real time.

Cozy Cinema is a warm, scrapbook-styled web app for movie lovers. Friends can add movies from free sources, save favorites, book keepsake tickets, journal about what they watched, and jump into shared watch rooms.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page introducing Cozy Cinema.
- [Movies](/movies): Browse and add movies from free sources with AI-assisted metadata.
- [Favorites](/favorites): Your personal collection of favorite movies.
- [Tickets](/tickets): Digital keepsake tickets for booked movie nights.
- [Journal](/journal): A social feed to share reviews, clips, and reactions with friends.
- [Friends](/friends): Find friends and manage your movie-night circle.
- [Sign in](/auth): Create an account or sign in to Cozy Cinema.

## Optional

- [Profile](/profile): Your account details, avatar, and movies you added.
